title: gamogyne lurida
side_effects: Gamogyne lurida can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. Furthermore, improper use of Gamogyne lurida can exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as kidney or liver disease.
